title: Atlas Computer Laboratory
text: Home * Organizations * Atlas Computer Laboratory Atlas Computer Laboratory at Chilton [1] Atlas Computer Laboratory , at Chilton site, Oxfordshire , United Kingdom was one of the major computer laboratories in the world, which operated between 1961 and 1975 [2] . The Chilton site campus was shared between Atlas Laboratory and the Harwell Atomic Energy Research Establishment . In 1975 the Atlas Computer Laboratory was closed, moving some parts to the Daresbury Laboratory and in 1979 with the Appleton Laboratory to form the Rutherford Appleton Laboratory . Since 2007 the Rutherford Appleton Laboratory has been operated by the Science and Technology Facilities Council .
